resolved_question: Among Apple Inc.'s subsidiaries listed in Exhibit 21, which operate in jurisdictions where Apple Inc. reports active litigation in Item 3?

expected_answer.summary: Apple Operations International (Ireland) and Apple Distribution International (Ireland) operate in Ireland. Apple Inc. discloses ongoing antitrust proceedings in the European Union (which includes Ireland) under Item 3 of its 10-K. No other Exhibit-21 subsidiaries are sited in jurisdictions named explicitly in the active-litigation disclosures.

narrative_recovery: If paper-mirror underperforms here, lead with: 'this scenario requires section-crossing — Exhibit 21 listings are tabular, Item 3 narrative; even paper-mirror's dual-channel can struggle when the subsidiary→jurisdiction join requires inferring "EU includes Ireland".'
